server_info: Port, bind address and optional TLS for the shared HTTP server used by all enabled endpoints.
listenPort_help: Local TCP port. Must be reachable from the UniFi controller when the webhook receiver is enabled.
listenIp_help: IP address to bind to. 0.0.0.0 listens on all interfaces.
tls_server_info: Enable only if you do not have a TLS-terminating reverse proxy in front. Certificates are taken from the ioBroker certificate store (System settings → Certificates).
enableTls_help: Serve the shared HTTP endpoint over HTTPS.
controllerHost_help: IP address or hostname of your UniFi Access controller (UA Ultra in standalone mode, or any host running UniFi Access).
apiToken_help: Generate a token in the UniFi Access UI under Access → Settings → General → Advanced → API Token.
verifyTLS_help: Disabled by default — UniFi Access uses a self-signed certificate that does not validate by default.
caCert_help: Optional. Paste the controller's CA certificate to enable strict TLS validation.
wsReconnectDelay_help: Maximum back-off delay between WebSocket reconnect attempts.
doorbell_info: Incoming doorbell calls are shown passively. Accepting/rejecting calls requires WebRTC, which is not part of this adapter — use the official UniFi Access app for that.
defaultUnlockDuration_help: 0 sends a momentary unlock pulse via /doors/:id/unlock. Any value > 0 keeps the door unlocked for that many minutes via /doors/:id/lock_rule type=custom (the API only accepts whole minutes).
enableWebhooks_help: Activates additional door, sensor, schedule and visitor events via webhook.
enableThumbnailServer_help: Serves the latest event thumbnail per device as a JPEG. Used by the www panel.
events_info: Forward selected UniFi Access events to arbitrary ioBroker states. Leave empty to use only the built-in event states. Webhook-only events require the webhook receiver to be enabled.
auth_status_missingToken: API token missing — fill it in and click 'Test connection'
auth_test_tooltip: Probe the controller with the entered host/port/token without saving.
auth_test_error_network: Cannot reach controller. Check host, port and TLS settings.
generic_webhook_info: HTTP endpoint for the UniFi Alarm Manager. Receives POST requests from the UniFi Alarm Manager on the shared HTTP server and writes the payload to an ioBroker state.
enableGenericWebhook_help: Accepts POST requests from the Alarm Manager on the shared HTTP server (see HTTP server tab) under the path configured below.
genericWebhookPath_help: URL path the receiver accepts requests on.
protect_info: Connects to the UniFi Protect controller (UCG Max) to automatically fetch a camera snapshot on door events. The snapshot is shown as a thumbnail in the www panel event log. Credentials: local admin user of the Protect controller (same host as Access, port 443).
